sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. Stock: Steady Biotech Leader with Strong Dividend Yield and Growth Guidance Amid Analyst Mixed Views
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. is highlighted as a robust biotechnology company with strong Q4 earnings, positive FY2026 EPS guidance, and a reliable 2.89% dividend yield. The article details Amgen's core business model, pipeline innovations in obesity and oncology, and competitive advantages, while also addressing risks like patent expirations and high debt. Analysts currently rate Amgen as a "Hold" with an average price target of $354.60.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Tradr 2X Short TSLA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:TSLQ)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the Tradr 2X Short TSLA Daily ETF (TSLQ) based on various indicators. It presents an overview of oscillator and moving average signals across different timeframes, noting a current "buy" signal for TSLQ based on the summary technical rating, though this varies by timeframe. The article emphasizes that this information is not investment advice and advises users to consider all available data.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Stock Rises on Q2 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, with revenues of $1.71 billion and diluted EPS of $2.42, leading to a 2.14% stock increase. The article also details recent insider trading activity, institutional holdings changes, congressional stock transactions, and analyst price targets for BR.

feed.title: CVS starts smaller neighborhood pharmacies, plans nearly 20 in 2026
feed.summary: CVS Health has opened its first pharmacy-only location in Chicago, part of a strategy to launch nearly 20 such sites this year and more than 40 new CVS Pharmacy locations overall, including those within Target stores. These smaller, approximately 3,000 sq ft, apothecary-style pharmacies focus on prescriptions, immunizations, and pharmacist counseling to increase access to in-person care in various communities. This initiative is a response to patient preferences for face-to-face interactions, with 80% favoring in-person pharmacy care according to a 2025 CVS Health Rx Report.

feed.title: Daniel H. Schulman (VZ) awarded cash-settled phantom stock via deferred plan
feed.summary: Verizon director Daniel H. Schulman was awarded 183.933 units of cash-settled phantom stock, valued at $14.47 per unit, through a deferred compensation plan. This compensation-related award, economically equivalent to 52 underlying shares of common stock, is settled in cash and does not involve the direct purchase or sale of Verizon shares. After this grant, Schulman holds a total of 6,783.762 phantom stock units, which become payable upon predetermined events and include units accumulated through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Costco’s Amazing Success
feed.summary: Costco's shares have risen 14% this year, defying market downturns, largely due to its bulk buying capabilities, in-store gas stations with competitive pricing, and strong membership model. The company's unique strategy, including its Kirkland brand and membership fees accounting for a significant portion of its gross profit, allows it to keep prices low and maintain high member renewal rates. Although supply chain interruptions are anticipated to increase costs, Costco is well-positioned to weather the upcoming economic challenges.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: This document details the offering of $2,450,000 Review Notes issued by JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC and fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to an equally weighted basket of five reference stocks (Broadcom, Salesforce, Meta Platforms, NVIDIA, and Oracle) and are designed for investors seeking an early exit at a premium if the basket's closing level meets a specified Call Value. The notes involve significant risks, including potential loss of principal, credit risks of both the issuer and guarantor, and limitations on appreciation potential.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories stock hits 52-week low at 102.39 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories stock has reached a 52-week low of $102.39, marking a 22.81% decline over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro data suggests the healthcare giant may be undervalued with significant upside potential, highlighting its 56 consecutive years of dividend payments. The company is actively pursuing growth through acquisitions, such as Exact Sciences, and advancements in healthcare technologies, as noted by recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: Palo Alto Stock Fell on Anthropic AI Fears. The CEO Made a $10 Million Purchase.
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has experienced a stock decline due to a software slump and recent cybersecurity concerns. However, the CEO, Nikesh Arora, made a significant purchase of approximately $10 million worth of company stock, signaling a bullish outlook for the company's future. This move is being interpreted as a positive indicator despite market fears.

feed.title: Here’s Why Citizens Is Cautious on Netflix Stock (NFLX), While Needham Stays Bullish
feed.summary: Citizens analyst Matthew Condon initiated coverage on Netflix (NFLX) with a Hold rating, citing limited near-term catalysts despite acknowledging the platform's strengths. Conversely, Needham analyst Laura Martin reiterated a Buy rating and a $120 price target for NFLX, highlighting recent price hikes, ad growth potential, AI adoption, and differentiated content as drivers for the stock to regain prior highs. Wall Street maintains a Strong Buy consensus rating on NFLX, with an average price target indicating a 22.4% upside potential.

feed.title: Delta flight to Atlanta returns to Brazil after engine issue, officials say
feed.summary: A Delta flight bound for Atlanta from São Paulo, Brazil, was forced to return to its origin airport shortly after takeoff due to a mechanical issue with the aircraft's left engine. All 270 passengers and 14 crew members on Flight 104 landed safely. Delta Air Lines is working to reaccommodate the affected passengers.

feed.title: Merck’s experimental pill beat three cholesterol drugs in Phase 3
feed.summary: Merck announced positive detailed results from its Phase 3 CORALreef AddOn trial for enlicitide decanoate, an investigational oral PCSK9 inhibitor. The study showed that enlicitide significantly reduced LDL-C by 64.6% from baseline, outperforming existing oral non-statin therapies like bempedoic acid and ezetimibe. This marks the third positive Phase 3 study for enlicitide, positioning it as a potentially critical treatment for patients with hypercholesterolemia and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease who struggle to reach target LDL-C levels on statin therapy.

feed.title: Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ:TWST) Given New $55.00 Price Target at Guggenheim
feed.summary: Guggenheim has raised its price target for Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ:TWST) to $55.00 from $50.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a 23.13% upside. This adjustment follows the company reporting revenue of $103.7 million (up 16.9% year-over-year and above estimates) but missing EPS estimates at -$0.50. Despite insider sales, institutional investors like Goldman Sachs and RBC have increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) Sets New 52-Week High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) recently hit a new 52-week high of $97.50, driven by positive analyst ratings and an increased quarterly dividend. Despite an elevated dividend payout ratio of 95.29%, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $100.73. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, topping estimates, and has seen insider buying activity.

feed.title: RainFocus Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Event Marketing and Management Platforms for Third Consecutive Year
feed.summary: RainFocus has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Event Marketing and Management Platforms for the third consecutive year. The company was noted for its furthest position in Completeness of Vision among evaluated vendors, highlighting its innovative AI framework, RainFocus Nexus. This recognition underscores RainFocus's commitment to driving innovation and delivering significant value to its customers in the evolving event marketing landscape.

feed.title: Ziperase Launches Enterprise Connector on the ServiceNow Store
feed.summary: Ziperase has launched its Enterprise Connector on the ServiceNow Store, integrating certified data erasure proof directly into ServiceNow Hardware Asset Management (HAM). This new connector eliminates the need for IT and compliance teams to manually track erasure certificates, providing automated, auditable, and accessible proof of erasure within the asset record itself. It is free for Ziperase Data Erasure Software users and compatible with ServiceNow's AI Platform Zurich release, streamlining IT asset disposition and compliance workflows.

feed.title: Ulta doubled store fulfillment capabilities in 2025
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty significantly expanded its ship-from-store program in fiscal year 2025, with over 1,000 U.S. stores now fulfilling e-commerce orders, an increase from 500 stores in 2024. This growth was aided by an AI-powered order management system, although its fulfillment center footprint remained largely the same. Other retailers like Walmart and Target are also increasingly leveraging their physical stores for fulfillment, highlighting a broader industry trend.

feed.title: PPG Industries Inc Stock: Steady Coatings Leader with FY2026 Guidance and Strategic Platform Launch
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. (NYSE: PPG) shares are trading around recent levels, supported by FY2026 EPS guidance of $7.70-$8.10 and the introduction of a new marine coatings analytics platform. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target of $124, though some valuation models suggest an undervaluation up to $153. The company, a global leader in coatings, is seen as a stable investment due to its dividend consistency, strong market position, and strategic innovations like the "InsightsNav" platform.

feed.title: Latest news: Vici acquiring Canadian portfolio; IHG adds in India, China; Marriott adds in Africa
feed.summary: Vici Properties is expanding its real estate portfolio by acquiring Canadian casino and hotel assets for $144.4 million, set to close in mid-2026. IHG Hotels & Resorts is growing its presence in India and Greater China, with new InterContinental and Atwell Suites properties. Marriott International has made its debut in Cape Verde, Africa, with a Four Points by Sheraton resort, marking its 500th select-service hotel in EMEA.

feed.title: Stratasys to support qualifcation & deployment of 3D printed parts across military platforms via US DOW contract
feed.summary: Stratasys Direct has been selected for the U.S. Department of War’s (DoW) Joint Additive Manufacturing Acceptability (JAMA) IV Pilot Parts Program. This program aims to accelerate the qualification and deployment of 3D printed parts across military platforms, expanding Stratasys's existing role in supporting defense organizations. The contract highlights increasing DoW budget allocations for additive manufacturing, with funding rising to $3.3 billion in fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Southwest stock trails top peers as a key strategic change backfires
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) stock has significantly underperformed its peers, dropping over 25% in the last 30 days, primarily due to rising jet fuel prices exacerbated by the ongoing Iran war. This severe impact is attributed to the company's decision last year to discontinue its fuel hedging strategy, a move that aimed to save on premiums but left it vulnerable to market volatility. While other airlines that ended hedging strategies years ago are also affected, Southwest's recent discontinuation has made it particularly susceptible, though its traditionally cheaper fares might attract more customers in the long run.

feed.title: Take-Two Stock Is Down 25% in 2026. Here’s Why GTA VI Still Dominates the Story
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) stock has fallen 25% in 2026 despite strong fiscal third-quarter results due to investors awaiting the November release of Grand Theft Auto VI. The company's valuation depends heavily on the success of GTA VI and sustained growth in recurrent consumer spending from existing franchises. Although analysts maintain higher price targets, the stock's performance is tied to execution, release timing, and whether current games can bridge the gap until the highly anticipated launch.

feed.title: Southwest stock trails top peers as a key strategic change backfires
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) stock has significantly underperformed its peers, dropping over 25% in the last 30 days during the Iran war, largely due to its decision to abandon its fuel hedging strategy last year. This move, intended to cut costs, backfired as jet fuel prices soared, forcing the company to raise fares while other airlines that maintained hedging strategies are less impacted. Technical analysis suggests LUV's stock price will likely continue to fall in the near term before potentially rebounding when the war ends.

feed.title: TIM S.A. (NYSE: TIMB) shareholders back 2025 accounts, board and pay plan
feed.summary: TIM S.A. shareholders have approved the company's 2025 financial statements, the allocation of 2025 results, and amendments to its by-laws. The Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting also saw investors vote on a Cooperation and Support Agreement, the classification and ratification of board members Mr. Denísio Augusto Liberato Delfino and Mr. Camillo Greco, the composition of the Fiscal Council, and the 2026 compensation proposal. The voting results were consolidated from the bookkeeper, central depository, and direct shareholder votes.

feed.title: ENPH Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for alleged securities fraud. Investors who purchased Enphase securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm to participate in the lawsuit. The complaint alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements about its ability to manage channel inventory and the negative impact of the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit.

feed.title: Broadcom Expands Security Reach With Symantec CBX As Shares Lag Targets
feed.summary: Broadcom has launched Symantec CBX, a new cloud-based cybersecurity platform that integrates Symantec and Carbon Black technologies, targeting mid-sized organizations with limited security resources. This move expands Broadcom's security software footprint alongside its semiconductor business. Despite recent share weakness, the company's valuation is seen as below analyst targets and an estimated fair value.

feed.title: Technical resistance and mixed momentum keep AMD stock subdued after busy product and AI news
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is currently trading at $201.22, showing a slight dip of 0.48% today. Despite launching a new CPU and receiving a boost from Meta's increased AI chip purchases, the stock faces resistance, with technical indicators suggesting sustained selling pressure and weak upside momentum. Analysts predict AMD will likely consolidate between $195.00 and $205.00 in the near term, with a downside bias prevailing.

feed.title: Video: Huntington Bank’s ‘3 Things We Learned this Week’
feed.summary: Huntington Bank's Director of Equity Research, Randy Hare, shares "The Three Things We Learned This Week" in a video. He discusses the latest manufacturing data and its implications for small businesses, provides an update on bond yields and their effect on mortgage rates for investors and prospective homebuyers, and highlights a significant breakthrough in artificial intelligence.

feed.title: The TJX Companies, Inc. Announces 13% Increase in Common Stock Dividend
feed.summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. announced a 13% increase in its quarterly common stock dividend, bringing it to $.48 per share, payable on June 4, 2026. This marks their 29th dividend increase in 30 years, demonstrating confidence in continued sales growth and profitability. Additionally, the company plans a significant share buyback program of approximately $2.50 to $2.75 billion for Fiscal 2027.

feed.title: AT&T Digital Literacy Push And Valuation Gap Draw Investor Attention
feed.summary: AT&T is collaborating with Think Together and Human-I-T to enhance digital literacy programs for K-12 students in California, a move that aligns its brand with vital social themes and could positively impact reputation. While AT&T's stock shows recent positive momentum, Simply Wall St estimates it's trading significantly below fair value, presenting a potential valuation gap. Investors are encouraged to monitor how these community investments correlate with broader business metrics, especially in light of expected earnings declines.

feed.title: Applied Automation in the Warehouse Boosts Value Across Stakeholders
feed.summary: Warehouse automation is accelerating, driven by labor shortages and the need for efficiency, and is reinforcing demand for well-located warehouse space. Contrary to concerns, automation does not reduce the need for space but rather helps solve operational constraints and expands distribution networks. Flexible automation solutions, especially AS/RS and AMR/AGV systems, are becoming more prevalent and are leading to higher retention, longer lease durations, and higher rental rates for automated facilities.

feed.title: SunocoCorp (NYSE:SUNC) Reaches New 1-Year High - Here's Why
feed.summary: SunocoCorp (NYSE:SUNC) reached a new 52-week high of $63.65 during Monday's trading, closing at $62.8930 on significant volume. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $64.00 price target, though analysts have mixed views, including a recent upgrade to "strong-buy" from Raymond James and a downgrade to "strong sell" from Zacks. Major institutional investors like Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley initiated substantial positions in SUNC during the fourth quarter.

feed.title: Walmart Mexico Expands Strategic Partnership with Vusion to Deploy Connected Store Platform Across Express Stores and Supercenters
feed.summary: Walmart de México y Centroamérica is expanding its partnership with Vusion to deploy the EdgeSense connected store platform across its Walmart Express stores, with plans to extend to Supercenters. This initiative will equip Walmart Express stores with over 1.7 million electronic shelf labels and 180,000 EdgeSense smart rails by the end of 2026, aiming to modernize operations, improve customer experience, and increase associate productivity. The deployment marks the first large-scale rollout of EdgeSense in Latin America, positioning Walmart Mexico as a leader in retail innovation.

feed.title: American Water Marks 140 Years of Safe, Reliable Water and Wastewater Service to Customers and Communities in 2026 – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: American Water is commemorating 140 years of providing safe, clean, reliable, and affordable water and wastewater services. The company plans to invest up to $48 billion in infrastructure upgrades and regulated acquisitions over the next decade. American Water also recognized the 15th anniversary of its Charitable Foundation and the 45th anniversary of its Research & Development Program.

feed.title: How Leadership Transition After David Simon’s Passing Could Shape Simon Property Group’s (SPG) Mall Investment Story
feed.summary: Simon Property Group announced the passing of longtime CEO David Simon and the scheduled succession of Eli Simon to CEO and President, with Larry Glasscock named Non-Executive Chairman. This leadership transition follows a well-established plan, suggesting continuity in the company's strategy regarding its retail and mixed-use properties. Despite the change, the core investment narrative focusing on leasing strength, redevelopment, and managing refinancing risks remains central to the company's outlook.

feed.title: Uber Blacklane Deal Puts Focus On Luxury Growth And Valuation Gap
feed.summary: Uber Technologies is acquiring Blacklane, a premium chauffeur service, to expand its presence in the luxury and executive travel market. This move represents a strategic shift for Uber, aiming for higher-margin customers beyond its core ride-hailing business. The deal could impact Uber's revenue mix and offers a potential valuation upside, as the stock currently trades significantly below analyst targets and estimated fair value despite recent short-term declines.

feed.title: Judge Halts Nexstar-Tegna Merger, Ruling That Deal Is ‘Presumed Likely to ‌Violate Antitrust Laws’
feed.summary: A federal judge has temporarily halted Nexstar Media's $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna, ruling that the deal is "presumed likely to violate antitrust laws" due to the combined company's potential market share. The temporary restraining order was issued in response to a lawsuit from DirecTV, with a hearing scheduled to determine if a preliminary injunction is warranted. Critics, including DirecTV and eight state attorneys general, contend that the merger would lead to higher consumer costs, reduced competition, and increased blackouts of programming.

feed.title: Judge Halts Nexstar-Tegna Merger, Ruling That Deal Is ‘Presumed Likely to ‌Violate Antitrust Laws’
feed.summary: A federal judge has temporarily halted Nexstar Media's $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna, ruling that the deal is "presumed likely to violate antitrust laws." The merger would create a company with 259 full-power TV stations, reaching 80% of U.S. households. DirecTV and eight state attorneys general filed lawsuits arguing the merger would increase consumer costs, reduce local competition, and lead to more blackouts.

feed.title: TD (TD) offers callable notes: 9.15% contingent coupon, worst‑of Nasdaq‑100/Russell 2000/S&P 500
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering Callable Contingent Interest Barrier Notes linked to the least performing of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 indices. These Notes offer a 9.15% per annum contingent interest rate, paid quarterly only if each index is at or above a 50.00% barrier on observation dates. TD has the option to call the Notes quarterly, starting from the second contingent interest payment date, and the maturity payment depends on the least performing index's final value relative to its 50.00% barrier, exposing investors to potential principal loss.

feed.title: Tempest Reports Year End 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
feed.summary: Tempest Therapeutics reported its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, highlighting a transformative year with the strategic acquisition of new CAR-T assets. The company announced positive interim data from its lead CAR-T program, TPST-2003, for multiple myeloma, showing a 100% complete response rate in efficacy-evaluable patients. Financially, Tempest ended 2025 with $7.7 million in cash, down from $30.3 million in 2024, reporting a net loss of $26.3 million.

feed.title: Noteworthy Insider Activity: ShyueShyh Lin Invests $111K In Taiwan Semiconductor Stock
feed.summary: ShyueShyh Lin, VP at Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE: TSM), recently purchased 2,000 shares of the company's stock for $111,260. Insider transactions are considered an important indicator in investment decisions, suggesting that insiders anticipate a stock's price appreciation when they buy. Taiwan Semiconductor exhibits strong profitability indicators, including a high gross margin and above-average EPS, despite its revenue growth lagging some industry peers.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Koppers to Ring Closing Bell for 20th Listing Anniversary
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update, noting rising markets despite ongoing Middle East conflict. Koppers (NYSE: KOP) CEO Leroy Ball will ring the closing bell to celebrate the company's 20th listing anniversary. The update also highlighted discussions on AI's business impact and sustainable farming practices.

feed.title: TD (NYSE: TD) offers 12.8% autocallable notes tied to AMD/NVDA shares
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering Autocallable Fixed Interest Barrier Notes linked to the performance of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) and NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) shares, paying approximately 12.80% interest per annum. These notes are automatically called if both underlying assets reach their call threshold values, returning the principal plus interest. If not called, and either asset falls below its barrier value at maturity, investors face potential loss of principal through physical delivery of the least performing stock.

feed.title: Tamboran Resources (NYSE:TBN) Price Target Raised to $58.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Tamboran Resources (NYSE:TBN) to $58.00 from $35.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 32.19% upside. This comes despite mixed analyst opinions, with MarketBeat's consensus being a "Moderate Buy" at an average target of $44.00, and Weiss Ratings reaffirming a "sell" rating. Tamboran Resources, an independent energy company focused on Australian natural gas exploration, is currently trading near its 12-month high with a market cap of approximately $993 million.

feed.title: BankUnited (NYSE:BKU) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Wells Fargo & Company Analyst Says
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for BankUnited (NYSE:BKU) to $55, maintaining an "overweight" rating, which suggests a 23% upside. This aligns with other analysts who have also increased their price targets for BKU, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $54. Despite missing revenue expectations, BankUnited recently reported strong quarterly earnings, while insider selling has occurred, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the company's stock.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Boosts Associated Banc (NYSE:ASB) Price Target to $31.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Associated Banc (NYSE:ASB) to $31.00 from $30.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This upgrade follows Associated Banc's better-than-expected quarterly earnings of $0.80 EPS, surpassing the $0.69 consensus, and the board's approval of a $100 million share buyback. Despite varied analyst opinions, the stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $29.30, trading near $25.10.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates: Quality Remains, But Growth Is Slowing (NASDAQ:JKHY)
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) demonstrates stable operational momentum with strong Q2 revenues and EPS, yet it faces structural growth headwinds. The company's business model is characterized by 90% recurring revenues and high margins, but its single-digit revenue growth and modest EPS growth limit its upside. Despite a current valuation of 24x P/E, which is a discount to historical multiples, the valuation is still considered elevated for a defensive, low-growth profile, prompting a neutral stance on the stock.

feed.title: Adobe Inc. (ADBE) is attracting investor attention: Here is what you should know
feed.summary: This article focuses on why Adobe Inc. (ADBE) is currently capturing the interest of investors. It suggests that investors should be informed about various aspects of the company. The content provided is too brief to extract specific details, but it highlights Adobe's current relevance in the market.

feed.title: How Amex exploits new AI tools
feed.summary: American Express is extensively integrating artificial intelligence across its operations, identifying "hundreds" of use cases in areas like sales, engineering, and customer service. CEO Steve Squeri highlighted that AI tools help Amex travel advisors provide faster recommendations, engineers trim coding times by over 30%, and sales teams generate leads and automate follow-ups. Despite widespread concerns about AI-driven job losses, Amex emphasizes that its AI adoption focuses on enhancing tools and deepening customer relationships rather than significantly reducing headcount.

feed.title: Verizon to report earnings April 27, 2026
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company will host a webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET to present results, with materials available on its Investor Relations website an hour and a half prior. Verizon generated revenues of $138.2 billion in 2025 by providing mobile and network connectivity services to millions of customers worldwide.
